v6

Bullframe CSS

The Lightweight CSS Framework

Build fast, responsive, and accessible UIs with native CSS. No Sass required.

Get Started GitHub View Demo

Get Started in Seconds

Add Bullframe CSS to your project with a single line

<!-- CDN -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bullframe.css@6/dist/css/bullframe.min.css">

Or install via npm:

$ npm install bullframe.css

Why Bullframe CSS?

Everything you need to build modern web interfaces

⚡

Lightning Fast

Native CSS with PostCSS. No Sass compilation overhead. Small bundle size (~8KB gzipped).

🎨

CSS Custom Properties

All variables use CSS custom properties. Easy to customize and theme without rebuilding.

📱

Fully Responsive

Mobile-first design with flexible grid system. Works perfectly on all screen sizes.

♿

Accessible by Default

Built with accessibility in mind. WCAG compliant colors and focus management.

🌙

Dark Mode Ready

Multiple theme variants: light, dark, and system-default. Automatic dark mode support.

🚫

Classless-Friendly

Works with semantic HTML. No utility classes required, but available when you need them.

🌐

Cross-Browser

Consistent styling across all modern browsers. PostCSS autoprefixer included.

🔧

Framework Agnostic

Works with any JavaScript framework or vanilla HTML. No dependencies required.

~8KB Gzipped Size
0 Dependencies
100% Native CSS
9+ Build Variants

Perfect For

Ideal for a wide range of projects

  • Landing Pages — Fast, beautiful pages that convert
  • Marketing Sites — Professional sites with minimal setup
  • Blogs & Docs — Clean typography and readable layouts
  • Product Listings — Responsive grids and cards
  • Micro-sites — Quick prototypes and MVPs
  • Admin Dashboards — Consistent form and table styling
